footer.tagline: The premium booking platform connecting you with the best barbers and salons in your city.

hero.subtitle: Discover and book top-rated barbers near you. Premium cuts, seamless booking, no waiting.

features.subtitle: Everything you need for the perfect grooming experience.
features.findNearbyDesc: Discover top-rated barbers in your area with real-time availability.
features.easyBookingDesc: Book your appointment in seconds. Pick your time, confirm, done.
features.securePaymentDesc: Pay safely with cards, TWINT, PayPal or Klarna. Your choice.
features.verifiedReviewsDesc: Real reviews from real customers. Know what to expect.
features.noWaitingDesc: Skip the queue. Your barber is ready when you arrive.
features.guaranteedDesc: Not satisfied? We'll make it right. Your satisfaction matters.

howItWorks.title: HOW IT WORKS
howItWorks.subtitle: Book your next haircut in four easy steps. No cap, it's that simple.
howItWorks.step1Desc: Scope out the best barbers in your area. Check ratings, vibes, and prices — find your perfect match.
howItWorks.step2Desc: Lock in your slot with a few taps. Pick your service, choose your time, done deal.
howItWorks.step3Desc: Pull up on time, get treated right. No waiting around, straight to the chair.
howItWorks.step4Desc: Show some love — drop a review and help the community find quality barbers.

cta.subtitle: Join thousands of satisfied customers who trust BCUTZ for their grooming needs. Book your next appointment in seconds.
cta.noSubscriptionFees: No subscription fees for barbers. Only pay when you earn.

about.subtitle: ABOUT US
about.title: REDEFINING THE
about.description: BCUTZ connects discerning clients with the finest barbers in Switzerland, making premium grooming accessible to everyone.

story.title: Our Story
story.paragraph1: Founded in 2024 in Switzerland, BCUTZ was born from a simple observation: finding a great barber shouldn't be left to chance.
story.paragraph2: Our founders, passionate about both technology and grooming, set out to create a platform that would connect clients with verified, skilled barbers while making the booking process seamless and modern.
story.paragraph3: Today, BCUTZ serves thousands of clients across Switzerland, partnering with the country's finest barbers to deliver exceptional grooming experiences.

about.storyP1: Founded in 2024 in Switzerland, BCUTZ was born from a simple observation: finding a great barber shouldn't be left to chance.
about.storyP2: Our founders, passionate about both technology and grooming, set out to create a platform that would connect clients with verified, skilled barbers while making the booking process seamless and modern.
about.storyP3: Today, BCUTZ serves thousands of clients across Switzerland, partnering with the country's finest barbers to deliver exceptional grooming experiences.

intro.title: 1. Introduction
intro.p1: Welcome to BCUTZ ("we," "our," or "us"). These Terms of Service ("Terms") govern your use of our platform and services available at bcutz.com (the "Platform"). By accessing or using our Platform, you agree to be bound by these Terms in accordance with Swiss law.
intro.p2: BCUTZ is a partnership registered under Swiss law, located at Schulhausstrasse 15, 1713 St. Antoni, Fribourg, Switzerland.

definitions.title: 2. Definitions
definitions.customerDesc: refers to individuals who use the Platform to book barbershop services.
definitions.barberDesc: refers to professional barbers who offer their services through the Platform.
definitions.userDesc: refers to both Customers and Barbers collectively.
definitions.servicesDesc: refers to the booking platform and related features provided by BCUTZ.

eligibility.title: 3. Eligibility
eligibility.content: You must be at least 18 years of age to use our Platform. By using our Services, you represent and warrant that you meet this age requirement and have the legal capacity to enter into binding contracts under Swiss law.

account.title: 4. Account Registration
account.intro: To use certain features of our Platform, you must create an account. You agree to:
account.item1: Provide accurate, current, and complete information during registration
account.item2: Maintain the security of your password and account
account.item3: Promptly update your account information if it changes
account.item4: Accept responsibility for all activities that occur under your account

forCustomers.title: 5.1 For Customers
forCustomers.content: BCUTZ provides a booking platform that enables Customers to discover barbers, view their services and prices, book appointments, and process payments. BCUTZ acts as an intermediary and is not itself a provider of barbershop services.

forBarbers.title: 5.2 For Barbers
forBarbers.content: Barbers can create profiles, list their services and prices, manage appointments, and receive payments through the Platform. Barbers are independent service providers and not employees of BCUTZ.

bookingsPayments.title: 6. Bookings and Payments
bookingsPayments.intro: When you book a service through our Platform:
bookingsPayments.item1: A binding contract is formed between you and the Barber upon booking confirmation
bookingsPayments.item2: BCUTZ charges a platform fee of CHF 2.00 per booking
bookingsPayments.item3: Prices displayed include applicable VAT where required
bookingsPayments.item4: Payment is processed through our secure payment providers

cancellation.title: 7. Cancellation and Refund Policy
cancellation.intro: In accordance with Swiss law, BCUTZ has established the following cancellation policy to provide a fair balance between customer flexibility and protection for Barbers:
cancellation.over48hDesc: Full refund minus a CHF 2.00 administrative processing fee
cancellation.24to48hDesc: 70% refund of the service price (30% cancellation fee retained)
cancellation.12to24hDesc: 50% refund of the service price (50% cancellation fee retained)
cancellation.under12hDesc: No refund (100% of service price retained)
cancellation.noShowDesc: No refund and the Customer may be subject to restrictions on future bookings
cancellation.platformFeeNote: The platform fee of CHF 2.00 is non-refundable in all cases as it covers payment processing and administrative costs.
cancellation.barberIntro: If a Barber cancels an appointment:
cancellation.barberItem1: The Customer receives a full refund including the platform fee
cancellation.barberItem2: Repeated cancellations by Barbers may result in account suspension

userConduct.title: 8. User Conduct
userConduct.item1: Use the Platform for any unlawful purpose
userConduct.item2: Harass, abuse, or harm other Users
userConduct.item4: Attempt to gain unauthorized access to the Platform
userConduct.item5: Interfere with the proper functioning of the Platform
userConduct.item6: Circumvent the Platform to avoid fees

ip.title: 9. Intellectual Property
ip.content: The Platform and its original content, features, and functionality are owned by BCUTZ and are protected by Swiss and international copyright, trademark, and other intellectual property laws.

liability.title: 10. Limitation of Liability
liability.intro: To the maximum extent permitted by Swiss law:
liability.item1: BCUTZ provides the Platform "as is" without warranties of any kind
liability.item2: BCUTZ is not liable for the quality of services provided by Barbers
liability.item3: BCUTZ shall not be liable for indirect, incidental, or consequential damages
liability.item4: Our total liability shall not exceed the fees paid by you in the preceding 12 months
liability.note: These limitations comply with Art. 100 of the Swiss Code of Obligations.

indemnification.title: 11. Indemnification
indemnification.content: You agree to indemnify and hold harmless BCUTZ and its officers, directors, employees, and agents from any claims, damages, losses, or expenses arising from your use of the Platform or violation of these Terms.

disputes.title: 12. Dispute Resolution
disputes.content: In case of disputes, we encourage you to contact us first at team@bcutz.com to seek an amicable resolution. If a dispute cannot be resolved amicably, it shall be subject to the exclusive jurisdiction of the courts of Fribourg, Switzerland.

governingLaw.title: 13. Governing Law
governingLaw.content: These Terms shall be governed by and construed in accordance with the laws of Switzerland, without regard to its conflict of law provisions.

modifications.title: 14. Modifications
modifications.content: We reserve the right to modify these Terms at any time. We will notify you of material changes by email or through the Platform at least 30 days before they take effect.

severability.title: 15. Severability
severability.content: If any provision of these Terms is found to be unenforceable or invalid under Swiss law, that provision shall be modified to the minimum extent necessary to make it enforceable.

contact.title: 16. Contact Information
contact.intro: For any questions regarding these Terms of Service, please contact us at:

intro.title: 1. Introduction
intro.content: BCUTZ ("we," "our," or "us") is committed to protecting your privacy in accordance with the Swiss Federal Act on Data Protection (DSG/nDSG) and, where applicable, the EU General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR). This Privacy Policy explains how we collect, use, disclose, and safeguard your personal data when you use our platform.

controller.title: 2. Data Controller
controller.intro: The data controller responsible for your personal data is:

provided.title: 3.1 Data You Provide
provided.accountDesc: Name, email address, phone number, profile picture
provided.paymentDesc: Payment card details (processed by our payment providers), billing address
provided.barberProfileDesc: Shop name, address, services, prices, bank details for payouts
provided.communicationsDesc: Messages, reviews, and feedback you submit

automatic.title: 3.2 Data Collected Automatically
automatic.deviceDesc: Browser type, operating system, device identifiers
automatic.locationDesc: Approximate location based on IP address (for finding nearby barbers)
automatic.cookiesDesc: See our Cookie Policy for details

legalBasis.title: 4. Legal Basis for Processing
legalBasis.intro: Under the Swiss DSG and GDPR, we process your personal data based on the following legal grounds:
legalBasis.contractDesc: To provide our booking services and process transactions
legalBasis.legitimateDesc: To improve our services, prevent fraud, and ensure platform security
legalBasis.legalDesc: To comply with Swiss law, including tax and accounting requirements
legalBasis.consentDesc: For marketing communications and non-essential cookies

howWeUse.title: 5. How We Use Your Data
howWeUse.intro: We use your personal data to:
howWeUse.item1: Provide and maintain our Platform and Services
howWeUse.item5: Respond to your inquiries and provide customer support
howWeUse.item6: Improve our Platform and develop new features
howWeUse.item7: Detect and prevent fraud and abuse

dataSharing.title: 6. Data Sharing
dataSharing.intro: We may share your personal data with:
dataSharing.usersDesc: To facilitate bookings (limited to necessary information)
dataSharing.cloudDesc: To host and operate our Platform
dataSharing.analyticsDesc: To understand Platform usage (in anonymized form where possible)
dataSharing.legalDesc: When required by Swiss law or to protect our legal rights
dataSharing.noSelling: We do not sell your personal data to third parties.

retention.title: 7. Data Retention
retention.intro: We retain your personal data only as long as necessary for the purposes outlined in this policy:
retention.accountDesc: Until you delete your account, plus any legally required retention period
retention.transactionsDesc: 10 years (as required by Swiss commercial law)

rights.title: 8. Your Rights
rights.intro: Under the Swiss DSG and GDPR, you have the following rights:
rights.accessDesc: Request a copy of your personal data
rights.erasureDesc: Request deletion of your data ("right to be forgotten")
rights.restrictionDesc: Limit how we process your data
rights.portabilityDesc: Receive your data in a machine-readable format
rights.objectDesc: Object to processing based on legitimate interests
rights.withdrawDesc: Withdraw consent at any time for consent-based processing
rights.howTo: To exercise these rights, contact us at team@bcutz.com. We will respond within 30 days as required by law.

security.title: 9. Data Security
security.intro: We implement appropriate technical and organizational measures to protect your personal data, including:
security.item1: Encryption of data in transit (TLS) and at rest

children.title: 10. Children's Privacy
children.content: Our Platform is not intended for children under 18 years of age. We do not knowingly collect personal data from children. If you believe a child has provided us with personal data, please contact us immediately.

changes.title: 11. Changes to This Policy
changes.content: We may update this Privacy Policy periodically. We will notify you of material changes by email or through the Platform. The "Last updated" date at the top indicates when the policy was last revised.

contact.title: 12. Contact Us
contact.intro: For any questions about this Privacy Policy or our data practices, please contact our Data Protection Officer:

intro.title: 1. Introduction
intro.content: This Cookie Policy explains how BCUTZ ("we," "our," or "us") uses cookies and similar technologies on our platform. This policy is designed to comply with the Swiss Federal Act on Data Protection (DSG/nDSG), the Swiss Telecommunications Act (FMG), and the EU ePrivacy Directive where applicable.

what.title: 2. What Are Cookies?
what.content: Cookies are small text files that are placed on your device (computer, smartphone, or tablet) when you visit a website. They are widely used to make websites work more efficiently, provide a better user experience, and give website owners useful information.
what.localStorageDesc: Data stored in your browser that persists after you close it
what.sessionStorageDesc: Data stored temporarily during your browsing session
what.pixelsDesc: Small images used for analytics and tracking

necessary.title: 3.1 Strictly Necessary Cookies
necessary.content: These cookies are essential for the Platform to function properly. They cannot be disabled as they are necessary to provide services you have requested.

functional.title: 3.2 Functional Cookies
functional.content: These cookies enable enhanced functionality and personalization, such as remembering your preferences and settings.

analytics.title: 3.3 Analytics Cookies
analytics.content: These cookies help us understand how visitors interact with our Platform by collecting and reporting information anonymously. We only use these with your consent.

marketing.title: 3.4 Marketing Cookies
marketing.content: These cookies are used to deliver advertisements relevant to you and your interests. Currently, BCUTZ does not use marketing cookies. If this changes, we will update this policy and request your consent.

consent.title: 4. Your Consent
consent.intro: In accordance with Swiss and EU law, we obtain your consent before placing non-essential cookies on your device:
consent.necessaryDesc: Do not require consent as they are essential for Platform functionality
consent.otherDesc: Require your explicit consent before being placed
consent.banner: When you first visit our Platform, you will see a cookie consent banner that allows you to accept or reject different categories of cookies.

managing.title: 5. Managing Your Cookie Preferences
managing.intro: You can manage your cookie preferences in several ways:

settings.title: 5.1 Our Cookie Settings
settings.content: You can change your cookie preferences at any time by clicking the "Cookie Settings" link in our website footer or by contacting us.

browser.title: 5.2 Browser Settings
browser.content: Most web browsers allow you to control cookies through their settings. You can:
browser.item1: View cookies stored on your device
browser.item3: Block cookies from specific or all websites
browser.item4: Set your browser to notify you when a cookie is placed
browser.note: Please note that blocking all cookies may affect the functionality of our Platform.

thirdParty.title: 6. Third-Party Cookies
thirdParty.content: Some cookies on our Platform are placed by third-party services. These third parties have their own privacy policies governing their use of cookies.

dataProtection.title: 7. Data Protection
dataProtection.intro: Information collected through cookies is processed in accordance with our Privacy Policy and Swiss data protection law. This includes:
dataProtection.item1: Your right to access information about cookies we use
dataProtection.item2: Your right to withdraw consent at any time
dataProtection.item3: Secure storage and processing of cookie data
dataProtection.item4: Limited retention periods for cookie data

updates.title: 8. Updates to This Policy
updates.content: We may update this Cookie Policy from time to time to reflect changes in technology, legislation, or our business practices. The "Last updated" date at the top of this policy indicates when it was last revised.

contact.title: 9. Contact Us
contact.intro: If you have any questions about our use of cookies or this policy, please contact us:

adminManagement.grantAdminDesc: Are you sure you want to grant admin access to {{name}}? They will receive an email notification.
adminManagement.revokeAdminDesc: Are you sure you want to revoke admin access from {{name}}? They will lose all admin privileges and receive an email notification.
adminManagement.deleteAccountDesc: This action is permanent and cannot be undone. The user's data will be permanently deleted.
adminManagement.optionalMessage: Optional message to user (will be included in email):

barberVerification.title: BARBER VERIFICATION
barberVerification.subtitle: Review and approve new barber registrations
barberVerification.searchPlaceholder: Search by name, city, or email...
barberVerification.noPending: No pending verifications at the moment.
barberVerification.adjustFilters: Try adjusting your search or filters.
barberVerification.approveDesc: Are you sure you want to approve {{name}}? They will be visible to customers and can start accepting bookings.
barberVerification.rejectDesc: Are you sure you want to reject {{name}}? They will not be visible to customers.
barberVerification.revokeDesc: Are you sure you want to revoke verification for {{name}}? They will be deactivated and no longer visible to customers. All active bookings may be affected.
barberVerification.reasonRequired: Required: Enter a reason for revoking verification...
barberVerification.reasonOptional: Optional: Enter a reason for rejection...
barberVerification.barberApprovedDesc: {{name}} has been verified and is now live. Email notification sent.
barberVerification.barberRejectedDesc: {{name}} has been rejected. Email notification sent.
barberVerification.newRegistrationDesc: A new barber has registered and is awaiting verification.

cookieConsent.title: COOKIE SETTINGS
cookieConsent.description: We use cookies to enhance your experience. By continuing to visit this site you agree to our use of cookies.
cookieConsent.necessaryDesc: Required for the website to function. Cannot be disabled.
cookieConsent.analyticsDesc: Help us understand how visitors interact with our website.

notFound.description: The page you're looking for seems to have gone dark. Let's get you back on track.

notifications.enableDescription: Get instant updates on your bookings and exclusive offers.
notifications.enabledDesc: You'll receive booking updates and reminders.
notifications.blockedDesc: Please enable notifications in your browser settings.
notifications.disabledDesc: You won't receive push notifications anymore.
notifications.notSupportedDesc: Push notifications are not supported in this browser.

languageRegion.title: Language & Region
languageRegion.subtitle: Set your preferred language and region
languageRegion.paymentCurrencyDesc: Choose your preferred currency for payments
languageRegion.detectedCurrency: Detected currency based on your location

paymentMethodsPage.title: PAYMENT METHODS
paymentMethodsPage.subtitle: All payments are securely processed at checkout. We never store your payment details.
paymentMethodsPage.securityDesc: Your payment information is encrypted and processed securely by Stripe. We never have access to your full card details.
paymentMethodsPage.step1Desc: Choose your barber, service, and time slot
paymentMethodsPage.step2Desc: Select your preferred payment method and complete the secure checkout
paymentMethodsPage.step3Desc: Receive instant confirmation and payment receipt via email
paymentMethodsPage.creditDebitDesc: Visa, Mastercard, American Express - securely processed via Stripe
paymentMethodsPage.twintDesc: Pay directly from your Swiss bank account via TWINT app
paymentMethodsPage.klarnaDesc: Pay later or split into installments
paymentMethodsPage.twintPaymentsDesc1: When you select TWINT at checkout, you'll be redirected to complete the payment via the TWINT app. Simply scan the QR code or confirm the payment in your TWINT app.
paymentMethodsPage.twintPaymentsDesc2: The payment goes directly to the barber after deducting our small platform fee. All Swiss banks supporting TWINT are accepted.

twoFactorAuth.title: TWO-FACTOR AUTHENTICATION
twoFactorAuth.subtitle: Add an extra layer of security to your account
twoFactorAuth.enabledDesc: Your account is protected with an authenticator app
twoFactorAuth.disabledDesc: Enable 2FA to add an extra layer of security
twoFactorAuth.protectAccountDesc: Two-factor authentication adds an extra layer of security by requiring a code from your authenticator app in addition to your password.
twoFactorAuth.scanQRCodeDesc: Scan this QR code with your authenticator app (Google Authenticator, Authy, 1Password, etc.)
twoFactorAuth.step1: Download an authenticator app like Google Authenticator, Authy, or 1Password
twoFactorAuth.step2: Scan the QR code or enter the secret key manually
twoFactorAuth.step3: Enter the 6-digit code to verify and activate 2FA
twoFactorAuth.step4: You'll need to enter a code from your app each time you sign in
twoFactorAuth.successDesc: 2FA has been enabled on your account
twoFactorAuth.disabledSuccessDesc: Two-factor authentication has been removed from your account

notificationsPage.reviewRequestsDesc: Get reminded to leave reviews after visits

notificationsPage.phoneRemindersDesc: Get reminded on your phone before appointments
